overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a narrative adventure game showing characters traversing a Mediterranean-style coastal environment. The clip follows a protagonist in medieval armor who joins a companion with a shield and later a child, walking from sandy beaches to rocky shorelines with a small wooden shelter built into the cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with distant rocky headlands

events.description: companion character with red cloak and shield enters view walking ahead on the beach

agents.ego_description: walking alone across the sandy beach toward a distant figure

notable_agents.action: companion wearing a red cloak and carrying a large decorated shield walking ahead

entered.detail: expansive sandy beach with scattered seaweed and driftwood debris
tall layered rock formations with sparse vegetation lining the left side of the coast
calm blue sea with gentle waves lapping the shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit sandy beach with the camera following a lone armored character from behind. Rocky cliffs rise in the distance to the left while the ocean stretches to the right. As the character walks forward, a companion with a red cloak and shield becomes visible ahead, marking the transition to the next segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal shoreline transitioning from sand to rocky tide pools

events.description: ground surface transitions from soft sand to wet rocky shoreline with tide pools
small wooden shelter structure with stairs becomes visible built into the cliff face ahead

agents.ego_description: following the companion along the shoreline where waves meet the rocky coast

notable_agents.action: companion with decorated shield walking steadily along the water's edge

entered.detail: wet rocks and shallow tide pools replacing the sandy beach along the water
small wooden structure with stairs built against the cliff face

segments.scene_description: The character follows the shield-bearing companion along the coastline as the terrain shifts from soft sand to wet, rocky shore with tide pools. The cliffs draw closer on the left while waves crash on the right. A small wooden shelter with stairs becomes visible against the cliff face in the distance as they continue forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path with wooden shelter and cave entrance

events.description: child character joins the group, taking the protagonist's hand as they walk
group passes the wooden shelter and continues past it into the rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: leading a child by the hand while following the companion through the rocky coastal path

notable_agents.action: companion with shield leading the way toward a dark cave entrance
child holding the protagonist's hand while walking carefully over the rocks

entered.detail: dark opening in the cliff face near the wooden structure
massive rock formation sitting on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Now a group of three, the characters traverse the rocky coastal terrain as a child joins, holding the protagonist's hand. They approach and pass a wooden shelter built into the cliff, revealing a dark cave entrance nearby. The terrain becomes increasingly rugged with large boulders as they move away from the water's edge toward the cliffs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a Mediterranean coastline that transforms from a wide sandy beach into a rugged, rocky cliffside. It begins by following a lone armored character across sunlit sands, with the ocean to the right and distant cliffs to the left, until a companion with a red cloak and shield appears ahead. As the character catches up, the terrain shifts from soft sand to a wet, rocky shore filled with tide pools where waves crash against the encroaching cliff face. The scene then expands to include a child holding the protagonist's hand as the group approaches a small wooden shelter and a dark cave entrance built into the stone. Finally, the camera moves away from the water's edge, traversing increasingly rugged terrain and large boulders as the party pushes deeper toward the cliffs.
